title: Review: full jmap-chat codebase
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Session-never-refreshed (B5) is spec-noncompliant and will hurt on real deployments; empty-string ID validation (B3) is a maintainability class issue; template substitution bug (B1) is a latent correctness trap. Transport security (scheme checks) is incomplete. Test coverage gaps leave SSRF guard and OOM guard unverified.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: methods_test.rs not fully read (31k tokens), jmap.rs test coverage not fully inventoried, egui client_task.rs SSE reconnect path not traced end-to-end. Would raise confidence with: full methods_test.rs read, end-to-end SSE reconnect trace, review of jmap.rs tests.
